---
title: "Miss Cheape"
---

## Miss Cheape

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

She published in <i>MP</i>  \'Mr Valentine\' and \'Christian\'s Name\' as \'Joanna Harrison\', under which name also appeared a novel, <i>A Northern Lily</i> (1886).  She lived at St. Andrew\'s, and perhaps was Harriette Cheape, elder daughter of Alexander Cheape (1803-1892), of Strathyrum, St. Andrews, Fife, or his younger daughter Jean Anne.

### Letters

- Letter from June 6th 1890
- Letter from May 17th 1890

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
